images.altText: Luxury cruise ship Valiant Lady sailing in Mediterranean
Valiant Lady cruise ship deck view and design
Balcony stateroom cabin on board Valiant Lady
Gourmet fine dining restaurant onboard cruise ship

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 5
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 6
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 7

seo.title: 21-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders | Valiant Lady | Virgin Voyages
seo.metaDescription: Book a 21-night Mediterranean cruise onboard Valiant Lady of Virgin Voyages. Visiting Barcelona, Cannes, Genoa. Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
